Options:
  --with-node        Start a simulated Kaspa node in the background with mining
  --recipe <name>    Run an initial recipe/template inside the sandbox
  -p, --port <port>  Port for dashboard (default: "3000")
  -h, --host <host>  Host for dashboard (default: "localhost")
  --help             display help for command

Usage: hardkas workflow create [options] <name>

Create a deterministic workflow from a template

Options:
  --template <name>   Embedded template name (basic, payroll, dao, escrow,
                      marketplace)
  --out <path>        Output artifact file path
  --json              Output the final workflow artifact as JSON (default:
                      false)
  --workspace <path>  Override workspace root directory
  -h, --help          display help for command

Usage: hardkas workflow run [options] <file>

Execute a workflow JSON definition in Agent mode

Options:
  --dry-run        Simulate the workflow without mutating the filesystem
                   (default: false)
  --network <net>  Target network (e.g. simulated, testnet-10, mainnet)
  --offline        Force offline execution (rejects real RPC connections)
                   (default: false)
  --timeout <ms>   Maximum execution time in milliseconds
  --json           Output the final workflow artifact as JSON (default: false)
  -h, --help       display help for command

Usage: hardkas workflow inspect [options] <id>

Inspect a completed workflow artifact

Options:
  --json      Output full artifact as JSON (default: false)
  -h, --help  display help for command

Usage: hardkas workflow replay [options] <id>

Deterministically replay and verify a workflow's lineage

Options:
  -h, --help  display help for command

Usage: hardkas workflow diff [options] <a> <b>

Compare two workflow artifacts structurally

Options:
  -h, --help  display help for command
